phase_name: session 73 — strategic analysis, benchmarks, roadmap design

completed_tasks.name: Full product & market strategic analysis
completed_tasks.details: 7-phase analysis: current value prop, market pain points (top 20), gap analysis, stack expansion options (A/B/C/D), competitive positioning vs SonarQube/Semgrep/Sourcegraph/OpenRewrite/Claude Code, revenue multipliers, final recommendations. Verdict: deepen Java/Spring + Kotlin only, MCP-first distribution, migrate-check as #1 feature.

completed_tasks.name: Detailed roadmap design: 3 strategic fronts
completed_tasks.details: Full roadmap for migrate-check (Spring Boot 2→3), MCP polish, CI/CD gate. Phases 0-3 (0-12 months). Includes explicit assumptions, risks, success metrics, what NOT to build.

completed_tasks.name: Benchmark: 7 real Java repos
completed_tasks.details: Tested spring-petclinic(47), eureka(409), jobrunr(964), openmrs-core(1281), BroadleafCommerce(2985), keycloak(7885) Java files. Results: linear scaling, no crashes. petclinic=0.32s, keycloak=12.23s base scan. spring-audit: 0.28s-12s. onboard: 0.20s-20.7s. R-SCALE-01 CLOSED for spring-audit and base scan.

completed_tasks.name: Schema discovery: mode=contract vs GSD SourceMap
completed_tasks.details: Production CLI outputs mode=contract schema (richer than GSD roadmap SourceMap). Has contracts[].imports per file — foundation for migrate-check already exists. project.type, entry_points, summary all correctly populated.

completed_tasks.name: spring-audit quality validation on real repos
completed_tasks.details: BroadleafCommerce: 4 real TX-005 findings (removeCredit, removePayment). openmrs: 1 TX-005. keycloak: 0 (not Spring — correct). All legitimate findings on real enterprise code.

remaining_tasks.name: License TTL CI fix
remaining_tasks.details: license.py: _CACHE_TTL_SECONDS=1800 (30min) breaks CI containers. Fix: add SOURCECODE_CI=1 env var → TTL 86400 (24h). ~2h effort. Required before CI gate can be sold to enterprise.

remaining_tasks.name: migrate-check v1 implementation
remaining_tasks.details: New module: src/sourcecode/migrate_check.py. Use contracts[].imports (already computed) to find javax.persistence/servlet/validation/transaction imports. Detect WebSecurityConfigurerAdapter (already in repository_ir.py:2434,3286). Rules: MIG-001..008. Output: MigrationReport with readiness_score, blocking_count, findings, estimated_effort_days. CLI: sourcecode migrate-check . --format json|text --min-severity HIGH. Needs synthetic fixture tests/fixtures/javax_legacy/ (real repos all already migrated to jakarta).

remaining_tasks.name: spring-audit --ci flag
remaining_tasks.details: Add --ci mode to spring-audit_cmd: exit 1 on violations >= min_severity, structured JSON output + optional --format github-comment. GitHub Actions YAML starter in docs/. Reuse existing pr_comment_renderer.py.

remaining_tasks.name: MCP token budgets + migrate tool
remaining_tasks.details: Add per-tool output budget caps (dict MAX_TOKENS_PER_TOOL). Add get_migration_readiness() MCP tool delegating to migrate-check. Add when_to_call: doc hints to existing tool docstrings. Ensure outputs < 10k tokens per tool for Cursor compatibility.

remaining_tasks.name: Fix key_dependencies=0 on BroadleafCommerce onboard
remaining_tasks.details: onboard BroadleafCommerce returns key_dependencies: 0 despite being a major Maven multi-module Spring project. Likely gap in dependency detection when --dependencies not explicitly passed.

remaining_tasks.name: Deferred from session 36: E2E test + publish 1.33.4
remaining_tasks.details: Still pending from session 36: run sync_to_pipx.sh from normal Terminal, E2E verify 1.33.x fixes, publish 1.33.4 to PyPI/Homebrew.

human_actions_pending.action: Decide which P0/P1 to start first: license TTL fix or migrate-check v1
human_actions_pending.context: License TTL fix is 2h and unblocks CI gate sales. migrate-check v1 is 5-7d and unblocks the biggest revenue opportunity. Both can start independently.

decisions.decision: migrate-check reuses contracts[].imports — no new scanner needed
decisions.rationale: Production CLI already computes per-file import lists in mode=contract output. Iterate contracts, filter javax.*, categorize. Saves ~2 days of parser work.

decisions.decision: CI gate uses spring-audit --ci, NOT onboard --ci
decisions.rationale: onboard takes 9-20s on medium/large repos — unacceptable for CI. spring-audit: 0.28s-6s even on 2985-file repos. Onboard is human/agent workflow, not gate.

decisions.decision: Stack expansion: deepen Java/Spring + Kotlin only (next 12 months)
decisions.rationale: Spring TX semantic analysis is the moat. Kotlin is 70% of new Spring Boot projects, ~3 weeks of IR work. C#/.NET would take 12+ months to reach parity — dilutes moat before monetized.

decisions.decision: Spring Boot migrate-check is #1 revenue opportunity
decisions.rationale: Spring Boot 2 EOL Nov 2023 — market is in active pain. No competitor has semantic-depth migration checker. Budgeted projects with clear ROI. migrate-check v1 in 5-7 days leveraging existing IR.

benchmark_results.scale: Linear O(n) scaling confirmed. No crashes up to 7885 Java files.

schema_discovery.contracts_imports: Per-file import lists already computed — migrate-check can reuse directly
schema_discovery.entry_points: Correctly detected (5 in petclinic incl @SpringBootApplication + 4 controllers)

spring_audit_validation.real_findings: 4 TX-005 in BroadleafCommerce, 1 in openmrs — legitimate enterprise patterns
spring_audit_validation.credibility: ESTABLISHED — finds real bugs in real code

migration_test_gap.issue: All 7 testing repos already on jakarta EE — can't test migrate-check against real javax
migration_test_gap.fix: Create tests/fixtures/javax_legacy/ with synthetic Java files using javax.persistence/servlet/validation/transaction

next_action: Choose: (A) License TTL fix [2h, unblocks CI gate] OR (B) migrate-check v1 [5-7d, biggest revenue opportunity]. Both independent. Recommended start: (A) then (B).
context_notes: Session 73: pure strategy + benchmarking session. No code changes. Benchmarked 7 real Java repos (13k+ files total). Validated spring-audit finds real TX-005 bugs in BroadleafCommerce/openmrs. Discovered contracts[].imports is the foundation for migrate-check. All repos already on jakarta — need synthetic fixture for migration testing. License TTL (30min) is critical CI blocker. Roadmap designed for 3 fronts: migrate-check, MCP polish, CI/CD gate.
